title: Pintu-Pintu Surga
overview: Latifah's happy family life is tested when her husband passes away, leaving her to care for their child with ADHD and manage his educational foundation. Her former lover, Arman, helps with the foundation, bringing them closer until he proposes. Now, Latifah must decide whether she can accept becoming a second wife.
